relations.note: Container styling and color logic both govern the chart device.
Headline sits within the chart container.

quotes: Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.
uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar

rules.intent: Keep chart containers consistent with the system.
rules.rule_text: Chart containers are clean and easy to scan: a Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with uniform rounded corners (chart.container.radius = 12px) and a Brand Blue (#00529b) rounded header bar.

effect.reserved_for: emphasis on key figures/data points only
effect.subject: Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a)

quotes: Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only
Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.

rules.intent: Maintain a disciplined, readable chart color hierarchy.
rules.rule_text: Chart color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) are dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) are reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only. Placebo/comparator data uses neutral gray (chart.color.placebo).

quotes: Bars and chart icons: **rounded, approachable** shapes (rounded bar tops).

rules.intent: Convey an approachable, friendly chart aesthetic.
rules.rule_text: Bars and chart icons use rounded, approachable shapes (rounded bar tops).

quotes: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), **ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.
Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), **ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.

rules.intent: Give charts a consistent, branded headline treatment.
rules.rule_text: Chart headlines are set in Agenda (print) or Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), ALL CAPS, Brand Blue (#00529b), with a thin Gold (#ffc60a) rule beneath.

quotes: Statistical callouts: **large and bold** (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a **lighter weight beneath**.
Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.

rules.intent: Establish clear visual reading order within data displays.
rules.rule_text: Statistical callouts make the % figure the hero: rendered large and bold, with supporting copy in a lighter weight beneath. Footnotes are noticeably smaller and clearly separated from the primary data.
